positive: A majestic, minimalist ouroboros serpent encircling a detailed celestial map; the serpent should be depicted with clean, smooth lines, suggesting ink and gold leaf texture, while the map features constellations and mythical astronomical symbols. The composition must be highly symmetrical, centered on the ouroboros coil. Use a palette of deep midnight blues, shimmering golds, emerald greens, and stark cream whites. Style: Neo-geometric, mystical etching, tattoo flash art, with strong outlines and high contrast. Composition: Crest-view, suitable for repeating seamless pattern or central placement on apparel. Lighting: Dramatic, luminous glow emanating from the celestial map. Print-friendly details: Solid colors, clear vector lines, no excessive gradients or photorealism.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, logo, text, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, grainy, low detail, chromatic aberration, photorealism, excessive gradient
